description: You are a computer systems analyst who has just finalized a system architecture diagram in EdrawMax. You need to share this diagram with two audiences: the project manager needs a PDF copy for the formal design review document, and the development team needs a PNG image for their wiki page. Export the currently open diagram to ~/Documents/exports/diagram_export.pdf and ~/Documents/exports/diagram_export.png. Both exported files should contain the full diagram content. Watermarks from the trial version are acceptable.
